caption: A man with short dark hair, wearing a blue button-down shirt with a small "INFOOBJECTS" logo on the chest, speaks while wearing a headset microphone. He is positioned in front of a white backdrop featuring the logos "theCUBE" and "siliconANGLE". In the early part of the clip, a blue banner overlay appears at the bottom of the screen containing the text "#BigDataSV 2015", "RISHI YADAV | @meditativesoul", "CEO", and "infoObjects". A small hexagonal "SPONSORED BY INFOOBJECTS" graphic is also visible. As the clip progresses, the blue banner disappears, and a 3D blue cube graphic appears in the bottom left corner. A dark folder or laptop rests on the surface in front of him. The man remains in the same position, speaking and gesturing slightly with his head throughout the sequence.
